history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair is taking a selfie in a gym. He's wearing a sleeveless white v-neck t-shirt and navy blue sweatpants. A thin gold chain is visible around his neck, and he has a watch on his left wrist. He's holding a blue iPhone in his right hand, angled to capture his reflection. The background is a gym setting with green-painted equipment, mirrors reflecting other gym-goers, and what appears to be weight racks. The lighting is somewhat dim and artificial, typical of an indoor gym, casting soft shadows and highlighting the sweat on his skin, giving a slightly gritty, realistic feel. The overall mood is casual and focused on the subject's gym activity. The color palette consists of muted greens, blues, whites, and skin tones. The style is photorealistic with a slight grainy texture.
